Stanley 史丹利

Shorts Transformation Analysis 2022-2024
Stanley is one of the most established League of Legends streamers in the Taiwanese gaming community. This report analyzes 1,785 videos published between 2022 and 2024 to evaluate the channel's content strategy, audience engagement patterns, and the viability of a Shorts-first transformation to drive subscriber growth and interaction.

2023

Yearly Avg Views

Yearly Engagement Rate

Estimated Subscription CVR by Content Type

Monthly Views Stacked

Verdict

Conclusions & Recommendations

Key Takeaways

  • Long videos remain the backbone, delivering 82.1% of total views
  • Subscriber growth accelerated post-2023, correlating with increased Shorts output
  • Average churn rate of 1.27% is within healthy range for gaming channels
  • Wed is the optimal publishing day (10.8% above worst day)
  • Shorts engagement (2.05%) exceeds long video engagement (1.52%)
Data: YouTube Data API v3 | Analysis by Kerry | Generated: 2026-03-25
